description: Expected parse results for plain text format test fixtures. Plain parser always succeeds - it treats every line as a message.

01_structured.log.note: Plain parser should extract timestamp+level from lines matching its pattern

entries_with_structure.message: Failed to bind to port 443: permission denied
Unable to start server - exiting with code 1

01_structured.log.note_slash_format: Lines with yyyy/MM/dd format may or may not match depending on regex support for slash separator

02_unstructured.log.note: All lines are treated as messages. No structured fields extracted. Parser always succeeds as fallback.

03_nginx.log.note: Nginx access logs. Plain parser treats as unstructured fallback. Each line is a message.

04_apache.log.note: Apache HTTPD combined access log + error log. Plain parser handles as unstructured fallback.

05_syslog.log.note: Syslog RFC 3164 and RFC 5424 formats. Plain parser handles as unstructured fallback.

06_docker.log.note: Docker/container logs. Some lines contain their own JSON wrapper.

07_custom_app.log.note: Custom application log formats (Python, Go, Node.js).
